precondition: Fresh app settings or an older settings file without overlay_enabled
expected_behavior: Settings shows Overlay / 游戏悬浮层 with the 关闭 button active, and no overlay window is visible.

precondition: Desktop app is running, backend settings are loaded, Overlay has been enabled, and ReiLink is not the foreground app
expected_behavior: Switching Overlay to 开启 while Settings is foreground only persists enabled state. On macOS safe mode, switching away from ReiLink keeps auto-show fail-closed and no bubble appears; on non-macOS, a transparent frameless always-on-top small overlay window may appear without stealing focus.

precondition: Overlay is enabled and there is no recent safe assistant or proactive message
expected_behavior: Overlay shows a restrained idle placeholder such as Rei 正安静待机。 without showing debug content.

precondition: Overlay is enabled and an assistant reply has completed
expected_behavior: Overlay shows only a 1-3 message Rei bubble list using truncated safe summaries, with the latest assistant summary visible.

precondition: Overlay is enabled and proactive companion emits a safe short message
expected_behavior: Overlay may show the proactive safe short message as a Rei bubble without affecting the main chat flow.

precondition: Overlay is enabled and Settings is open
expected_behavior: Changing the Overlay position preset to any allowed corner or side preset updates the configured bounds within the primary display work area without forcing the overlay above Settings.

precondition: Overlay is enabled and Settings is open
expected_behavior: Changing Overlay background opacity between 0.35 and 0.95 updates the translucent background while Rei message text remains readable and does not force the overlay above Settings.

precondition: Overlay is enabled and several safe assistant or proactive messages have been shown
expected_behavior: Changing Overlay message count to 1, 2, or 3 limits the bubble list to that many latest safe summaries only.

precondition: Overlay is enabled while the ReiLink main window or Settings remains foreground
expected_behavior: Overlay remains enabled but the runtime window is hidden or destroyed while ReiLink is the active app, so Settings controls and macOS window buttons stay visible and operable. On macOS safe mode, it should remain fail-closed after switching away from ReiLink.

precondition: Overlay is enabled and shown in dev or packaged mode
expected_behavior: Overlay BrowserWindow loads the overlay-marked renderer entry and shows only the bubble or placeholder surface, not the full ReiLink sidebar, chat, Settings, Debug Panel, or input box.

precondition: Overlay is enabled or suspected to be stuck above the main UI
expected_behavior: Settings exposes a reliable 强制关闭悬浮层 button that sets overlay_enabled to off and hides or destroys the overlay window without needing a native select dropdown.

precondition: Overlay is currently enabled and visible
expected_behavior: Switching Overlay to 关闭 or using 强制关闭悬浮层 hides or destroys the overlay window and does not change main chat messages.

precondition: Overlay setting has been changed and the app is restarted
expected_behavior: Overlay enabled state, position preset, opacity, and message count are restored from app settings after restart; default remains off for fresh settings.

precondition: Overlay has been enabled, updated, and disabled at least once
expected_behavior: Event Stream shows overlay lifecycle summaries, message counts, and character counts only.

precondition: Desktop app is opened in dev or packaged smoke mode
expected_behavior: Main window is not black, Settings contains Overlay config, foreground enabling does not cover Settings, position and opacity settings save, disabling or force-closing hides the window, and macOS safe mode does not auto-show a bubble after switching away.

precondition: Packaged macOS app has Overlay enabled and the user switches to Finder or a browser
expected_behavior: macOS safe mode keeps Overlay auto-show disabled: no bubble appears, ReiLink does not steal focus, Dock and Cmd+Tab remain visible, and Settings can still disable Overlay when returning to ReiLink.

precondition: Packaged macOS app is opened in window mode or fullscreen mode during Overlay regression smoke
expected_behavior: ReiLink does not flicker, does not stay always-on-top, does not disappear from Dock or Cmd+Tab, does not auto-focus after switching away, and does not hide traffic lights or break close/minimize/fullscreen controls.

precondition: Current macOS packaged app is smoke-tested after Overlay safe mode freeze and Local ASR file picker work
expected_behavior: Packaged ReiLink starts non-black, remains visible in Dock and Cmd+Tab, can switch to Finder or a browser without focus stealing, keeps Settings operable, keeps Overlay foreground auto-show fail-closed, exposes 强制关闭悬浮层, and does not flicker, stay always-on-top, or hide traffic lights.

precondition: A future change attempts to restore macOS Overlay auto-show
expected_behavior: Before restoring auto-show, verify no mainWindow.focus focus stealing, no app activation loop, no macOS skipTaskbar strategy that hides the whole app, Overlay route only renders OverlayApp, foreground ReiLink hides overlay, Settings can always disable Overlay, Dock and Cmd+Tab remain visible, and packaged app manual smoke passes.
